scope.name: Project JS Files
scope.pattern: (file[SMRC - Web]:*//*.js||file[SMRC - Web]:*//*.jsx||file[SMRC - Web]:*//*.ts||file[SMRC - Web]:*//*.tsx||file[SMRC - Web]:*.js||file[SMRC - Web]:*.jsx||file[SMRC - Web]:*.ts||file[SMRC - Web]:*.tsx)&&!file[SMRC - Web]:.next//*&&!file[SMRC - Web]:.pnpm-store//*&&!file[SMRC - Web]:node_modules//*
